title: McCormick & Company to Present at Consumer Analyst Group of New York Conference
text: HUNT VALLEY, Md., Feb. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE: MKC), a global leader in flavor, will be presenting at the Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) Conference, to be held virtually, at 4:10 p.m.
